caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt with "CHECK IT" printed on the front, a black baseball cap with an emblem, headphones, and gold jewelry is seated in a studio setting. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone. The background features white walls with gold stars and text that includes "HUSTLE" and "BOSS TALK 101". On-screen graphics identify the program as "BOSS TALK 101" and "THE PODCAST". Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing. He starts with his hands down, then raises his right hand to his forehead, then raises both hands to touch his headphones, and finally keeps both hands on the headphones while continuing to speak. A small logo featuring a red circle and white text is visible on his shirt near the bottom.
